ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study protocol */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed, terminated) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "sponsor" TEXT /* Name of the study sponsor */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of study (e.g., observational, interventional) */,
  "study_phase" TEXT /* Phase of the study (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being conducted at the site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "investigator_name" TEXT /* Name of the investigator at the site */,
  "site_status" TEXT /* Status of the site (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "site_address" TEXT /* Address of the site */,
  "site_city" TEXT /* City where the site is located */,
  "site_state" TEXT /* State where the site is located */,
  "site_zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the site */,
  "site_country" TEXT /* Country where the site is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_sites_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the patient is enrolled in */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the patient is enrolled */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was enrolled */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES study_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_values" (
  "data_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data value */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the value belongs to */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the value belongs to */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date the value was collected */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the rule belongs to */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the rule applies to */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of rule (e.g., range check, format check) */,
  "rule_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the rule (e.g., value > 10) */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_rules_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rule_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rule that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the rule was changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rule_changes_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES validation_rules ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_protocol" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the protocol */,
  "protocol_version" TEXT /* Version of the protocol */,
  "protocol_status" TEXT /* Status of the protocol (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "protocol_description" TEXT /* Description of the protocol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., study coordinator, data manager) */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the user is associated with */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the permission */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the permission is for */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_site_personnel" (
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personnel */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site the personnel is at */,
  "personnel_name" TEXT /* Name of the personnel */,
  "personnel_role" TEXT /* Role of the personnel (e.g., investigator, coordinator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_site_personnel_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES study_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_site_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site the contact is for */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_site_contacts_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES study_sites ("site_id")
)
